ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR STATUS, CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2005, GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER , TWO CITATIONS ISSUED. STATUS REPORT PRESENTED WITH EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR EXAMINATION. COURT IS CONCERNED ON THE COST TO PREPARE THE ACCOUNTING FROM D.O.D. THE DIRECTION TO FILE AN ACCOUNTING UNDER 10953 IS DEFERRED. CLERK IS DIRECTED TO ISSUE CITATION TO GLEN ROTNER AND TO ALEENA CORONA TO APPEAR IN SAN BERNARDINO SUPERIOR COURT FOR EXAMINATION ABOUT ESTATE PROPERTY. THE CLERK OF THE SAN BERNARDIANO COURT IS REQUESTED TO SET THE EXAMINATION ON THE COURT'S CALENDAR

Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Walter Moore appearing by phone in pro per. He mailed in the verification last Friday. He recieved a response from the State Controller that they are processing claims from July. He filed his claim in July. He does not know how long he will get the funds. Matter is continued to 7/9 for status. He is to file a petition final distribution or a further status report. 2nd report on status of administration is continued to 1/22 for verification.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Continued To Dec-04-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Walter Moore appearing by phone. Jamay Lee appearing for Betty Anderson. Court does not see a P.O.S. and an updated status report. Mr. Moore has misunderstood that the Court wanting a status report. He reports to the Court that there are no changes. He is still waiting for the money for the State Controller. He filed his claim on 7/20 and he followed up on 9/5. He was told that it will take four months. Ms. Lee is complaining that Mr. Moore has told the Court that he has filed the claim before the 7/10 hearing and she received documents of the claim showing he did not filed until 7/20. Her office has received about $200.00 from Mr. Moore and he was suppose to turn over all the funds. Mr. Moore stated he had about $1,620.00 and he paid about $1,000.00 for bond premium and about $400.00 for costs. He has paid the balance to Mr. Drobny's office. Court wants Mr. Moore to file an exparte petition for reduction of bond and he is to file a written status report by 11/13. He is to give at least 15 days notice to everyone for a hearing on 12/4. All matters are continued to 12/4. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition For Order Releasing Funds Held By State Controller, For Order Removing Special Administrator And For Payment Of Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Jul-10-2006 Continued To Sep-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT
Off Calendar Jul-10-2006 Continued To Sep-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Walter Moore appearing by phone. Jamay Lee appearing for Betty J. Anderson. On Mr. Moore's status report, Court does not see a POS. Mr. Moore informs the Court that he has sent it in. Court questions the delay in closing the estate. Mr. Moore has problem finding assets. He has located funds held by the State Controller. He has applied for the funds two weeks ago. Court wants another status report at least one week before 9/18. Status is set for hearing on 9/18. If Mr. Moore files the petition for final distribution before 9/18 and has a hearing date, he will not need to appear on 9/18. As soon as he receives the funds from the State Controller, he is to pay Mr. Drobny's fees. It is not in the best interest of the estate to remove Mr. Moore at this time. Court is not ordering the State controller to release funds to Mr. Drobny. His petition is continued to 9/18. Ms. Lee asks for a copy of the application to the State Controller. Mr. Moore will look for a copy. He is to send notice of the status report to all parties. Mr. Moore may appear by phone on the next hearing. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition For Order Releasing Funds Held By State Controller, For Order Removing Special Administrator And For Payment Of Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Jun-27-2006 Continued To Jul-10-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT
Off Calendar Jun-05-2006 Continued To Jul-10-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Walter Moore appearing as the successor special administrator. Mr. Moore has spoken to Mr. Norton this morning regarding the procedural problemes. This petition was continued to 6/27, the same hearing date on a petition for removal of special administator. Court is continuing both petitions to 7/10. Mr. Moore reports to the court his efforts to locate the other assets. Washington Mutual will not release information without his application to their fraud division. Court wants an amended status report filed and served by 6/23 for hearing on 7/10. Mr. Moore can make arrangement to appear by phone. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT
Off Calendar May-15-2006 Continued To Jun-05-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. The administator has failed to correct his status report. OSC to be issued to administrator and attorney. Return date is 6/26. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
At 10:21am, the administrator Walter Moore called. He aplogizes for not arranging for appearance by phone. He is requesting for a continuance to appear in person. Court agrees to continue to 6/5 and OSC is not issued.
